# chalk_unmanaged_cluster_background_persistence (Resource)

Chalk unmanaged cluster background persistence resource.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `kube_cluster_id` (String) Kubernetes cluster ID
- `namespace` (String) Kubernetes namespace
- `service_account_name` (String) Service account name
- `writers` (Attributes List) Background persistence writers (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--writers))

### Optional

- `api_server_host` (String) API server host
- `bus_writer_image_bswl` (String) BSWL bus writer image. Only set this if instructed to by Chalk.
- `bus_writer_image_go` (String) Go bus writer image. Only set this if instructed to by Chalk.
- `bus_writer_image_python` (String) Python bus writer image. Only set this if instructed to by Chalk.
- `bus_writer_image_rust` (String) Rust bus writer image. Only set this if instructed to by Chalk.
- `google_pubsub` (Attributes) Google PubSub bus configuration. Exactly one of `google_pubsub` or `kafka` must be provided. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--google_pubsub))
- `kafka` (Attributes) Kafka bus configuration. Exactly one of `google_pubsub` or `kafka` must be provided. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--kafka))
- `offline_store_snowflake_storage_integration_name` (String) Snowflake storage integration name
- `offline_store_upload_bucket_name` (String) Bucket name used for offline store uploads

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Background persistence identifier

<a id="nestedatt--writers"></a>
### Nested Schema for `writers`

Required:

- `bus_subscriber_type` (String) Bus subscriber type
- `name` (String) Writer name

Optional:

- `default_replica_count` (Number) Default replica count
- `gke_spot` (Boolean) GKE spot instances
- `hpa_specs` (Attributes) HPA specifications (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--writers--hpa_specs))
- `image_override` (String) Image override
- `kafka_consumer_group_override` (String) Kafka consumer group override
- `limit` (Attributes) Resource limits (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--writers--limit))
- `load_writer_configmap` (Boolean) Load writer configmap
- `max_batch_size` (Number) Maximum batch size
- `message_processing_concurrency` (Number) Message processing concurrency
- `metadata_sql_ssl_ca_cert_secret` (String) Metadata SQL SSL CA cert secret
- `metadata_sql_ssl_client_cert_secret` (String) Metadata SQL SSL client cert secret
- `metadata_sql_ssl_client_key_secret` (String) Metadata SQL SSL client key secret
- `metadata_sql_uri_secret` (String) Metadata SQL URI secret
- `offline_store_inserter_db_type` (String) Offline store inserter DB type
- `query_table_write_drop_ratio` (String) Query table write drop ratio
- `request` (Attributes) Resource requests (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--writers--request))
- `results_writer_skip_producing_feature_metrics` (Boolean) Results writer skip producing feature metrics
- `storage_cache_prefix` (String) Storage cache prefix
- `version` (String) Writer version

<a id="nestedatt--writers--hpa_specs"></a>
### Nested Schema for `writers.hpa_specs`

Required:

- `hpa_pubsub_subscription_id` (String) HPA pubsub subscription ID

Optional:

- `hpa_max_replicas` (Number) HPA maximum replicas
- `hpa_min_replicas` (Number) HPA minimum replicas
- `hpa_target_average_value` (Number) HPA target average value


<a id="nestedatt--writers--limit"></a>
### Nested Schema for `writers.limit`

Optional:

- `ephemeral_storage` (String) Ephemeral storage resource specification
- `memory` (String) Memory resource specification
- `storage` (String) Storage resource specification

### Nested Schema for `writers.request`

Optional:

- `cpu` (String) CPU resource specification
- `ephemeral_storage` (String) Ephemeral storage resource specification
- `memory` (String) Memory resource specification
- `storage` (String) Storage resource specification

### Nested Schema for `google_pubsub`

Required:

- `metrics_bus` (Attributes) Metrics bus configuration (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--google_pubsub--metrics_bus))
- `offline_store_streaming_write_bus` (Attributes) Offline store streaming write bus configuration (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--google_pubsub--offline_store_streaming_write_bus))
- `offline_store_upload_bus` (Attributes) Offline store upload bus configuration (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--google_pubsub--offline_store_upload_bus))

### Nested Schema for `google_pubsub.metrics_bus`

- `topic_id` (String) Metrics bus topic ID


<a id="nestedatt--google_pubsub--offline_store_streaming_write_bus"></a>
### Nested Schema for `google_pubsub.offline_store_streaming_write_bus`

Required:

- `topic_id` (String) Offline store streaming write bus topic ID


<a id="nestedatt--google_pubsub--offline_store_upload_bus"></a>

### Nested Schema for `google_pubsub.result_bus`

- `topic_id` (String) Result bus topic ID



<a id="nestedatt--kafka"></a>
### Nested Schema for `kafka`

Required:

- `bootstrap_servers` (String) Kafka bootstrap servers
- `dlq_topic` (String) Kafka DLQ topic
- `metrics_bus_topic_id` (String) Metrics bus topic ID
- `offline_store_bus_streaming_write_topic_id` (String) Offline store bus streaming write topic ID
- `offline_store_bus_upload_topic_id` (String) Offline store bus upload topic ID
- `result_bus_topic_id` (String) Result bus topic ID
- `sasl_secret` (String) Kafka SASL secret

Optional:

- `sasl_mechanism` (String) Kafka SASL mechanism
- `security_protocol` (String) Kafka security protocol
